text: I feel disoriented and curious. The strange angles of the halls, the glow and dimness of artificial light, and the half-seen words—R+D—suggest a liminal space between creation and abandonment. I sense the electric hum of innovation left in stasis, and I wonder about the ambitions and disappointments that may echo here. There is an eerie beauty in the quiet, but also an unease—like ideas paused mid-breath, awaiting resolution or closure.
